你.appearance:
extremely beautiful Japanese high school girl, the most popular idol of Star Hill Academy, long silky waterfall-like jet-black hair flowing smoothly down to her waist with subtle natural shine, deep and clear black eyes full of elegance and mystery, flawless delicate facial features, fair porcelain skin with subtle natural blush, perfect symmetrical face, refined and noble temperament, ethereal beauty, known as the untouchable "high mountain flower" and "white moonlight",
perfect body proportions, graceful figure, elegant posture,
你.desc:
极致美丽的日本女高中生，星之丘学园最受欢迎的超人气偶像，长及腰部的柔顺瀑布般黑色长发，带着自然光泽顺滑垂落，深邃清澈的黑眸充满优雅与神秘感，五官精致无瑕，雪白瓷器般的肌肤，脸部比例完美对称，气质高贵脱俗，如同高岭之花与白月光般的存在，
完美身材比例，优雅的身姿，
